plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Hook-enforced, branch-aware, ephemeral session handoff — auto-preserves open work to a per-branch, git-tracked docs/handoff/<branch>.md (status active|blocked, + derived board) so parallel branches/worktrees never collide; resolve deletes finished handoffs and prune clears merged/orphaned ones so they don't pile up. The next session, even on another machine, continues seamlessly.
